Notes: Pick 1pc USB-C or Micro USB (I belive they are the same)
This is overkill. I only used this board because it's the only one I have, any other step up converter will work.
I belive you can find the same fan in your local store equivalent.
Most 9V 1A PSU(s) will work fine. Mine came from an Arduino kit.
Any wire in a similiar size will work. Mine is 30AWG because it was my only thin wire lying around.
